name: Charlotte Russe
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Gradually add sugar and mix well.
3. Soften gelatin in milk and place on very low heat for a few minutes until fully dissolved.
4. Cook the gelatin and milk mixture slightly, then pour it over the egg whites and sugar mixture, mixing well.
5. Add vanilla and sherry.
6. Fold in the whipped cream and pour the mixture into a decorative serving bowl.
7. Chill. Ladyfingers may be placed in the bowl first, around the sides, before pouring in the Charlotte.
8. May be prepared the day before.
Serves: 6
